ActionPlanSection.title: The plan behind SAP
ActionPlanSection.text: SAP is part of the Brazilian Action Plan to Combat Desertification and Mitigate the Effects of Drought (PAB-Brazil), launched by the Ministry of Environment and Climate Change in December 2025. It is the main implementation instrument of the PNCD, with a horizon through 2045. SAP corresponds to Objective 2.4 of the plan, under the "Research, innovation and information management" axis.
